Clubready, Llc'S Motion To Compel Enforcement Of Arbitration Summonses And Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities ***Redacted***
Off Calendar Feb-09-2024 Text Ruling

Attys. MICHAEL C. TU, Esq. and GREGORY J. MERCHANT, Esq. (Tel: 213-561-3250) and MICHAEL J. MCMAHON, Esq. (Tel: 617-937-2300) of Cooley LLP for petitioner ClubReady, LLC;

HEARING RE: PETITIONER CLUBREADY, LLC's Motion To Compel Enforcement Of Arbitration Summonses.

The Court vacates its tentative ruling and continues this motion to November 3, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. on the Discovery Calendar (to be heard by Judge Pro Tem James Fleming).

The Court indicates it will issue a new tentative ruling the court day prior to the new hearing date.

The Court instructs parties to deliver courtesy copies of all motion papers to the mailing addresses provided by the Court.

The Court indicates it will inform the parties if it is able to advance the hearing date to an earlier date.

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Attys. MICHAEL C. TU, Esq. and GREGORY J. MERCHANT, Esq. (Tel: 213-561-3250) and MICHAEL J. MCMAHON, Esq. (Tel: 617-937-2300) of Cooley LLP for petitioner ClubReady, LLC;
Atty. NOEL S. COHEN, Esq. of Polsinelli LLP (Tel: 310-556-1801) for respondents Bryan Arp and Bryan Arp Agency, Inc.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER CLUBREADY, LLC'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Both sides stipulate to the motion to admit counsel pro hac vice being admitted being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion to admit counsel pro hac vice is unopposed and is hereby granted.

Counsel for the moving party is directed to submit proposed orders in Word format to Temporary Judge James H. Fleming via email to jameshfleming@gmail.com with copies to all parties.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: S. Kane; Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR No. 13293, Email: sheilapham28@gmail.com, Tel: 415-274-9977 (302/JPT)
